description_long: This is a modern two-story house set within a landscaped lot, surrounded by a low perimeter wall and lush greenery, including several flowering trees. The house features a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior finishes, giving it a contemporary appearance. The front yard includes a swimming pool with a patio area furnished with umbrellas and seating, while the driveway leads to a garage with two parked cars. The backyard and side areas are filled with manicured lawns, shrubs, and decorative plants, enhancing the residential ambiance. The property is enclosed by a combination of solid and see-through fencing, providing both privacy and openness. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a seamless connection between the house and its landscaped surroundings.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens, featuring a pool, patio, and driveway with garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, swimming pool, patio area, and lush landscaping.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the driveway, garage with two cars, and additional garden space.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the garage, driveway, and extensive backyard greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the rear patio, pool, and more of the landscaped perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a modern door, small steps, and a covered porch area integrated into the facade.
